# Keynote speakers

```{css, echo = FALSE}
/* ---------- Switch layouts by screen size ---------- */

/* Desktop first */
.keynotes-mobile { display: none; }
.keynotes-desktop { display: block; }

/* Phone / small screens */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .keynotes-desktop { display: none; }
  .keynotes-mobile { display: block; }
}

/* ---------- Your existing styles (mobile accordion) ---------- */

/* Keep your justified text, but avoid awkward spacing on narrow screens */
.justify {
  text-align: justify !important;
  hyphens: auto;
}

/* Keynote card styling */
.keynote-card {
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 1rem 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
}

/* Make the summary a big, tappable header */
.keynote-card summary {
  cursor: pointer;
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0.9rem 1rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.9rem;
}

/* Hide default marker (Chrome/Safari) */
.keynote-card summary::-webkit-details-marker {
  display: none;
}

/* Speaker image */
.keynote-photo {
  width: 84px;
  height: 84px;
  object-fit: cover;
  border-radius: 14px;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}

/* Header text block */
.keynote-head {
  flex: 1 1 auto;
  min-width: 0;
}

.keynote-name {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.keynote-meta {
  margin: 0.25rem 0 0 0;
  opacity: 0.85;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

/* “chevron” indicator */
.keynote-toggle {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  opacity: 0.7;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  transition: transform 0.15s ease;
}
details[open] .keynote-toggle {
  transform: rotate(180deg);
}

/* Content area */
.keynote-body {
  padding: 0 1rem 1rem 1rem;
}

/* Make links easier to tap */
.keynote-links a {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-top: 0.6rem;
}

/* On small screens, keep it compact */
@media (max-width: 576px) {
  .keynote-photo {
    width: 72px;
    height: 72px;
    border-radius: 12px;
  }
  .keynote-name {
    font-size: 1.15rem;
  }
}

/* ---------- Desktop "old look" layout ---------- */
.desktop-keynote {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 160px;   /* text + photo */
  gap: 1.25rem;
  align-items: start;
  padding: 1.25rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
}

.desktop-keynote:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}

.desktop-keynote h3 {
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

.desktop-photo {
  width: 140px;
  height: 140px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  object-fit: cover;
  justify-self: end;
}

.desktop-links a {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
}
```

```{r results="asis", echo=FALSE}
speakers <- read.csv(file.path("..", "data", "keynote_speakers.csv"))

if ("order" %in% colnames(speakers)) {
    speakers <- speakers[order(speakers$order), ]
}

img_tag <- function(img, name, cls, alt_prefix = "Photo of") {
    if (!is.na(img) && img != "") {
        sprintf('<img src="../images/keynote_speakers/%s" class="%s" alt="%s %s">', img, cls, alt_prefix, name)
    } else {
        sprintf('<div class="%s" aria-hidden="true"></div>', cls)
    }
}

# ---------------- Desktop (old look) ----------------
cat('<div class="keynotes-desktop">\n')

for (i in 1:nrow(speakers)) {
    x <- speakers[i, ]

    name <- x$name
    position <- if (!is.na(x$position) && x$position != "") x$position else NULL
    bio <- if (!is.na(x$txt) && x$txt != "") x$txt else ""
    web <- if (!is.na(x$web) && x$web != "") x$web else NULL
    img <- if (!is.na(x$img_path) && x$img_path != "") x$img_path else ""

    cat('<div class="desktop-keynote">\n')
    cat("<div>\n")
    cat(sprintf("<h3>%s</h3>\n", toupper(name)))
    if (!is.null(position)) cat(sprintf("<p><strong>%s</strong></p>\n", position))
    if (bio != "") {
        cat('<div class="justify">\n')
        cat(bio, "\n")
        cat("</div>\n")
    }
    if (!is.null(web)) {
        cat('<div class="desktop-links">\n')
        cat(sprintf('<a href="%s">%s</a>\n', web, web))
        cat("</div>\n")
    }
    cat("</div>\n") # text col

    # photo col
    if (img != "") {
        cat(sprintf(
            "<div>%s</div>\n",
            img_tag(img, name, "desktop-photo")
        ))
    } else {
        cat("<div></div>\n")
    }

    cat("</div>\n") # desktop-keynote
}

cat("</div>\n") # keynotes-desktop


# ---------------- Mobile (accordion) ----------------
cat('<div class="keynotes-mobile">\n')

for (i in 1:nrow(speakers)) {
    x <- speakers[i, ]

    name <- x$name
    position <- if (!is.na(x$position) && x$position != "") x$position else NULL
    bio <- if (!is.na(x$txt) && x$txt != "") x$txt else ""
    web <- if (!is.na(x$web) && x$web != "") x$web else NULL
    img <- if (!is.na(x$img_path) && x$img_path != "") x$img_path else ""

    cat("::: {.keynote-card}\n")
    cat("<details>\n")
    cat("<summary>\n")

    # Photo
    if (img != "") {
        cat(sprintf(
            '<img src="../images/keynote_speakers/%s" class="keynote-photo" alt="Photo of %s">\n',
            img, name
        ))
    } else {
        cat('<div class="keynote-photo" aria-hidden="true"></div>\n')
    }

    cat('<div class="keynote-head">\n')
    cat(sprintf('<div class="keynote-name"><strong>%s</strong></div>\n', name))

    meta_lines <- c()
    if (!is.null(position)) meta_lines <- c(meta_lines, position)
    if (length(meta_lines) > 0) {
        cat(sprintf('<div class="keynote-meta">%s</div>\n', paste(meta_lines, "<br/>")))
    }

    cat("</div>\n") # keynote-head
    cat('<div class="keynote-toggle" aria-hidden="true">▾</div>\n')
    cat("</summary>\n")

    cat('<div class="keynote-body">\n')

    if (bio != "") {
        cat("::: {.justify}\n")
        cat(bio, "\n")
        cat(":::\n")
    }

    if (!is.null(web)) {
        cat('<div class="keynote-links">\n')
        cat(sprintf('<a href="%s">Website</a>\n', web))
        cat("</div>\n")
    }

    cat("</div>\n") # keynote-body
    cat("</details>\n")
    cat(":::\n\n")
}

cat("</div>\n") # keynotes-mobile
```
